merchants.name: Ocean & Daily
merchants.desc: Independent shop selling ocean-friendly sunscreens and zero-waste daily goods.

merchants.name: 7-ELEVEN Island Store
merchants.desc: Plastic-reduction future store featuring a cup rental station and bottle recycling.

merchants.name: Island Duty Free Shop
merchants.desc: The largest duty-free shop joining the cup rental initiative for eco-friendly shopping.

merchants.name: Green Island Hainbain
merchants.desc: Famous for local snacks, promoting local ingredients and encouraging reusable bags.

merchants.name: Brother's Story
merchants.desc: Iconic souvenir shop advocating environmental care by reducing plastic bag usage.

merchants.name: Stay Young Select Shop
merchants.desc: Must-visit shop for sustainable vintage apparel, unique souvenirs, and tasty soft-serve ice cream.

merchants.name: Shui Yuan Café
merchants.desc: Eco-certified green restaurant serving local natural ingredients and handmade scones.

merchants.name: Hijau Restaurant
merchants.desc: Offers custom vegan and vegetarian meals to help travelers reduce their carbon footprint.

merchants.name: Crazy Bar
merchants.desc: Popular nature-integrated BAR strictly rejecting single-use plastic and appealing drinks.

merchants.name: AMIS Cafe
merchants.desc: Reduces food mileage with local seafood and produce, actively promoting plastic reduction.

merchants.name: Dingo Tea Drinks
merchants.desc: Partner of the reusable cup rental station. Bring or rent a cup for a discount!

merchants.name: Crazyfried Seafood
merchants.desc: Uses eco-tableware and local catches to reduce food mileage. No single-use plastics.

diving.name: Cool Diving Resort
diving.desc: A premier resort offering professional PADI courses and boat diving.  Explore the deep with expert local guides.

diving.name: Green Island Bay Dive Center
diving.desc: Prime location with pro 1-on-1 diving courses and diverse island tours. Enjoy a full adventure from BBQ to SUP.

diving.name: Ocean Rover
diving.desc: PADI courses with pro gear and eco-focus. A pet-friendly stay perfect for solo travelers to make new friends.

diving.name: Blue Safari Diving Center
diving.desc: Year-round PADI courses and night tours. Dive with us to send waterproof postcards from our underwater mailbox!

accommodations.name: Greenisland Shiacare B&B
accommodations.desc: Named after Chih-Ke-Ah, an ocean health indicator, we strive to protect the island by minimizing our footprint.

accommodations.name: Hijau Hotel
accommodations.desc: Hijau means green in Malay. We offer a luxury island escape focused on nature and sustainability.

accommodations.name: Slow Island Hostel
accommodations.desc: Slow down and discover life's possibilities. We offer more than a stay—experience Green Islands history and stories.

accommodations.name: Green Island Unie 2020 Guild Hall
accommodations.desc: Newly renovated rooms and exquisite breakfast sets. A premium, comfortable stay right in the heart of Green Island.

accommodations.name: Ocean Diary Backpacker Inn
accommodations.desc: Top-tier diving with pro photos and instant film gifts. Experience a warm, chill stay filled with shared memories.

accommodations.name: Coast B&B
accommodations.desc: Modern ocean-front stay with breathtaking sunset views. Relax in a minimalist space right by the coast.
